utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hi ! Hi ! Hi . Has umm , anyone seen Chandler ?

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: I thought he was with you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: He ... he was with me umm , we are playing a little game , you know ? Hide and seek .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: You can not ask us son , that is cheating .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You are right , thanks for keeping me honest dad .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: Well , he better not come by here . He can not see the bride in the wedding dress .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Bing
utterances.text: As I recall when we got married , I saw the groom in the wedding dress .

emotion_cause.span: 7_As I recall when we got married , I saw the groom in the wedding dress .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Bing
utterances.text: But that was after the wedding , it is not bad luck then .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Bing
utterances.text: Honey , it is not good luck .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know ! Hey , how Chandler doing ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Great . He is doing great . Do not you worry about Chandler .
